content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""Read-only Streamlit dashboard for the BankNifty options paper monitor.
3	
4	Safety design:
5	- No FYERS order calls.
6	- No LLM/API calls.
7	- Database access is SELECT-only and opens a read-only transaction.
8	- Cron/config files are read from local disk only.
9	
10	Run with:
11	    uv run --with streamlit streamlit run dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py \
12	      --server.address 127.0.0.1 --server.port 8501
13	"""
14	from __future__ import annotations
15	
16	import json
17	import os
18	from dataclasses import dataclass
19	from datetime import datetime, timezone
20	from decimal import Decimal
21	from pathlib import Path
22	from typing import Any, Iterable
23	from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
24	
25	import psycopg
26	from psycopg.rows import dict_row
27	
28	try:
29	    from dotenv import load_dotenv
30	except Exception:  # pragma: no cover - dependency exists in project, fallback for resilience
31	    load_dotenv = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
32	
33	PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
34	PROFILE_ROOT = Path("/opt/data/profiles/finance")
35	CONFIG_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / "config" / "banknifty_options_paper.json"
36	JOBS_PATH = PROFILE_ROOT / "cron" / "jobs.json"
37	DEFAULT_DB_PORT = str(55_000 + 432)
38	DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://" + "hermes" + "@" + "127.0.0.1" + ":" + DEFAULT_DB_PORT + "/" + "finance_tracker"
39	IST = ZoneInfo("Asia/Kolkata")
40	MONITOR_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options deterministic paper monitor: 5m entry / 15s open-trade monitor"
41	HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options LLM heartbeat: cron/script safety audit"
42	DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options script-only LLM drift guard"
43	
44	
45	@dataclass(frozen=True)
46	class SafetyCheck:
47	    name: str
48	    ok: bool
49	    detail: str
50	
51	
52	class DashboardError(RuntimeError):
53	    """Raised for dashboard data loading issues."""
54	
55	
56	def load_json_file(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
57	    try:
58	        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
59	    except FileNotFoundError as exc:
60	        raise DashboardError(f"Missing file: {path}") from exc
61	    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
62	        raise DashboardError(f"Invalid JSON in {path}: {exc}") from exc
63	
64	
65	def database_url() -> str:
66	    if load_dotenv is not None:
67	        load_dotenv(PROJECT_ROOT / ".env")
68	    return os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL)
69	
70	
71	def connect_readonly() -> psycopg.Connection:
72	    conn = psycopg.connect(database_url(), row_factory=dict_row)
73	    # Defense-in-depth: if a future dashboard query accidentally writes, Postgres refuses it.
74	    conn.execute("SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION READ ONLY")
75	    return conn
76	
77	
78	def assert_readonly_sql(sql: str) -> None:
79	    stripped = sql.lstrip().lower()
80	    allowed = ("select", "with", "show")
81	    if not stripped.startswith(allowed):
82	        raise DashboardError("Dashboard SQL must be read-only SELECT/WITH/SHOW")
83	    banned = ("insert ", "update ", "delete ", "drop ", "alter ", "create ", "truncate ", "grant ", "revoke ")
84	    if any(token in stripped for token in banned):
85	        raise DashboardError("Dashboard SQL contains a banned write/DDL token")
86	
87	
88	def fetch_rows(sql: str, params: Iterable[Any] | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
89	    assert_readonly_sql(sql)
90	    with connect_readonly() as conn:
91	        with conn.cursor() as cur:
92	            cur.execute(sql, tuple(params or ()))
93	            return list(cur.fetchall())
94	
95	
96	def find_job(jobs_doc: dict[str, Any], name: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
97	    for job in jobs_doc.get("jobs", []):
98	        if job.get("name") == name:
99	            return job
100	    return None
101	
102	
103	def schedule_expr(job: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str | None:
104	    if not job:
105	        return None
106	    schedule = job.get("schedule")
107	    if isinstance(schedule, dict):
108	        return schedule.get("expr") or schedule.get("display")
109	    if isinstance(schedule, str):
110	        return schedule
111	    return job.get("schedule_display")
112	
113	
114	def evaluate_system_safety(config: dict[str, Any], jobs_doc: dict[str, Any]) -> list[SafetyCheck]:
115	    monitor = find_job(jobs_doc, MONITOR_JOB_NAME)
116	    heartbeat = find_job(jobs_doc, HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME)
117	    guard = find_job(jobs_doc, DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME)
118	    risk_filter = config.get("risk_filter") or {}
119	
120	    checks = [
121	        SafetyCheck("Paper-only config", config.get("paper_only") is True, f"paper_only={config.get('paper_only')!r}"),
122	        SafetyCheck("Live orders disabled", config.get("live_orders_enabled") is False, f"live_orders_enabled={config.get('live_orders_enabled')!r}"),
123	        SafetyCheck("Monitor job exists", monitor is not None, MONITOR_JOB_NAME),
124	        SafetyCheck("Monitor is script-only", bool(monitor and monitor.get("no_agent") is True), f"no_agent={None if monitor is None else monitor.get('no_agent')!r}"),
125	        SafetyCheck("Monitor has no model/provider", bool(monitor and not monitor.get("model") and not monitor.get("provider") and not monitor.get("base_url")), f"model/provider/base_url absent={bool(monitor and not monitor.get('model') and not monitor.get('provider') and not monitor.get('base_url'))}"),
126	        SafetyCheck("Monitor schedule", schedule_expr(monitor) == "* * * * 1-5", f"schedule={schedule_expr(monitor)!r}"),
127	        SafetyCheck("Entry cadence", config.get("entry_scan_interval_minutes") == 5, f"entry_scan_interval_minutes={config.get('entry_scan_interval_minutes')!r}"),
128	        SafetyCheck("Open-trade poll cadence", config.get("poll_interval_seconds") == 15, f"poll_interval_seconds={config.get('poll_interval_seconds')!r}"),
129	        SafetyCheck("30-minute LLM heartbeat", schedule_expr(heartbeat) == "0,30 4-10 * * 1-5", f"schedule={schedule_expr(heartbeat)!r}"),
130	        SafetyCheck("Script-only drift guard", bool(guard and guard.get("no_agent") is True), f"no_agent={None if guard is None else guard.get('no_agent')!r}"),
131	        SafetyCheck("Spread filter enabled", bool(risk_filter.get("enabled") is True and risk_filter.get("enforce_spread_filter") is True), f"risk_filter.enabled={risk_filter.get('enabled')!r}, enforce_spread_filter={risk_filter.get('enforce_spread_filter')!r}"),
132	    ]
133	    return checks
134	
135	
136	def inr(value: Any) -> str:
137	    if value is None:
138	        return "n/a"
139	    try:
140	        amount = Decimal(str(value))
141	    except Exception:
142	        return str(value)
143	    sign = "-" if amount < 0 else ""
144	    amount = abs(amount)
145	    return f"{sign}₹{amount:,.2f}"
146	
147	
148	def pct_from_open(ltp: Any, open_value: Any) -> Decimal | None:
149	    try:
150	        ltp_dec = Decimal(str(ltp))
151	        open_dec = Decimal(str(open_value))
152	    except Exception:
153	        return None
154	    if open_dec <= 0:
155	        return None
156	    return ((ltp_dec - open_dec) / open_dec * Decimal("100")).quantize(Decimal("0.01"))
157	
158	
159	def age_status(age_seconds: Any, stale_limit: int) -> tuple[str, str]:
160	    if age_seconds is None:
161	        return "UNKNOWN", "No quote timestamp"
162	    try:
163	        age = float(age_seconds)
164	    except Exception:
165	        return "UNKNOWN", str(age_seconds)
166	    if age <= stale_limit:
167	        return "OK", f"{age:.0f}s old"
168	    if age <= stale_limit * 2:
169	        return "WARN", f"{age:.0f}s old"
170	    return "STALE", f"{age:.0f}s old"
171	
172	
173	def get_db_snapshot() -> dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:
174	    return {
175	        "campaign": fetch_rows(
176	            """
177	            select campaign_id, name, starting_capital, active, max_daily_loss,
178	                   max_open_positions, max_trades_per_day, stop_loss_pct, target_pct,
179	                   no_new_trades_after, force_exit_time, poll_interval_seconds, updated_at
180	            from research.option_paper_campaigns
181	            order by updated_at desc
182	            limit 1
183	            """
184	        ),
185	        "banknifty_quote": fetch_rows(
186	            """
187	            select symbol, ltp, open, high, low, close, volume, quote_time, updated_at,
188	                   extract(epoch from (now() - updated_at)) as age_seconds
189	            from market.quotes
190	            where symbol='NSE:NIFTYBANK-INDEX'
191	            """
192	        ),
193	        "open_trades": fetch_rows(
194	            """
195	            select t.option_trade_id, t.symbol, t.option_type, t.expiry, t.strike,
196	                   t.entry_premium, q.ltp as current_premium, t.stop_premium, t.target_premium,
197	                   t.highest_premium, t.quantity, t.premium_value, t.entry_time,
198	                   t.strategy_version,
199	                   case when q.ltp is not null then (q.ltp - t.entry_premium) * t.quantity else null end as unrealized_pnl,
200	                   extract(epoch from (now() - q.updated_at)) as quote_age_seconds
201	            from research.option_paper_trades t
202	            left join market.quotes q on q.symbol = t.symbol
203	            where t.status='open'
204	            order by t.entry_time desc
205	            """
206	        ),
207	        "risk_today": fetch_rows(
208	            """
209	            select count(*) filter (where created_at at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata' >= (now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')::date) as trades_today,
210	                   coalesce(sum(case when status='closed' and exit_time at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata' >= (now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')::date then realized_pnl else 0 end), 0) as realized_today,
211	                   count(*) filter (where status='open') as open_count,
212	                   count(*) as total_trades
213	            from research.option_paper_trades
214	            """
215	        ),
216	        "latest_events": fetch_rows(
217	            """
218	            select e.event_time, e.event_type, e.premium, e.quantity, e.message,
219	                   t.symbol, t.option_type
220	            from research.option_paper_trade_events e
221	            left join research.option_paper_trades t on t.option_trade_id = e.option_trade_id
222	            order by e.event_time desc
223	            limit 50
224	            """
225	        ),
226	        "daily_snapshots": fetch_rows(
227	            """
228	            select snapshot_date, starting_capital, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, equity,
229	                   open_positions, closed_positions
230	            from research.option_paper_daily_snapshots
231	            order by snapshot_date desc
232	            limit 30
233	            """
234	        ),
235	        "constituent_quotes": fetch_rows(
236	            """
237	            with configured as (
238	              select jsonb_array_elements(%s::jsonb) as item
239	            )
240	            select item->>'symbol' as symbol,
241	                   item->>'fyers_symbol' as fyers_symbol,
242	                   q.ltp, q.open, q.updated_at,
243	                   extract(epoch from (now() - q.updated_at)) as age_seconds,
244	                   case when q.open is not null and q.open > 0 then round(((q.ltp - q.open) / q.open * 100)::numeric, 2) else null end as pct_from_open
245	            from configured
246	            left join market.quotes q on q.symbol = item->>'fyers_symbol'
247	            order by pct_from_open desc nulls last
248	            """,
249	            [json.dumps(load_json_file(CONFIG_PATH).get("constituents") or [])],
250	        ),
251	    }
252	
253	
254	def render_status_badge(st: Any, check: SafetyCheck) -> None:
255	    if check.ok:
256	        st.success(f"{check.name}: OK — {check.detail}")
257	    else:
258	        st.error(f"{check.name}: FAIL — {check.detail}")
259	
260	
261	def main() -> None:  # pragma: no cover - exercised by Streamlit smoke import plus manual run
262	    import streamlit as st
263	    import streamlit.components.v1 as components
264

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Read-only Streamlit dashboard for the BankNifty options paper monitor.

Safety design:
- No FYERS order calls.
- No LLM/API calls.
- Database access is SELECT-only and opens a read-only transaction.
- Cron/config files are read from local disk only.

Run with:
    uv run --with streamlit streamlit run dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py \
      --server.address 127.0.0.1 --server.port 8501
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from decimal import Decimal
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Iterable
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo

import psycopg
from psycopg.rows import dict_row

try:
    from dotenv import load_dotenv
except Exception:  # pragma: no cover - dependency exists in project, fallback for resilience
    load_dotenv = None  # type: ignore[assignment]

PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
PROFILE_ROOT = Path("/opt/data/profiles/finance")
CONFIG_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / "config" / "banknifty_options_paper.json"
JOBS_PATH = PROFILE_ROOT / "cron" / "jobs.json"
DEFAULT_DB_PORT = str(55_000 + 432)
DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://" + "hermes" + "@" + "127.0.0.1" + ":" + DEFAULT_DB_PORT + "/" + "finance_tracker"
IST = ZoneInfo("Asia/Kolkata")
MONITOR_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options deterministic paper monitor: 5m entry / 15s open-trade monitor"
HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options LLM heartbeat: cron/script safety audit"
DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options script-only LLM drift guard"


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SafetyCheck:
    name: str
    ok: bool
    detail: str


class DashboardError(RuntimeError):
    """Raised for dashboard data loading issues."""


def load_json_file(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    try:
        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except FileNotFoundError as exc:
        raise DashboardError(f"Missing file: {path}") from exc
    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
        raise DashboardError(f"Invalid JSON in {path}: {exc}") from exc


def database_url() -> str:
    if load_dotenv is not None:
        load_dotenv(PROJECT_ROOT / ".env")
    return os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL)


def connect_readonly() -> psycopg.Connection:
    conn = psycopg.connect(database_url(), row_factory=dict_row)
    # Defense-in-depth: if a future dashboard query accidentally writes, Postgres refuses it.
    conn.execute("SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION READ ONLY")
    return conn


def assert_readonly_sql(sql: str) -> None:
    stripped = sql.lstrip().lower()
    allowed = ("select", "with", "show")
    if not stripped.startswith(allowed):
        raise DashboardError("Dashboard SQL must be read-only SELECT/WITH/SHOW")
    banned = ("insert ", "update ", "delete ", "drop ", "alter ", "create ", "truncate ", "grant ", "revoke ")
    if any(token in stripped for token in banned):
        raise DashboardError("Dashboard SQL contains a banned write/DDL token")


def fetch_rows(sql: str, params: Iterable[Any] | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    assert_readonly_sql(sql)
    with connect_readonly() as conn:
        with conn.cursor() as cur:
            cur.execute(sql, tuple(params or ()))
            return list(cur.fetchall())


def find_job(jobs_doc: dict[str, Any], name: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    for job in jobs_doc.get("jobs", []):
        if job.get("name") == name:
            return job
    return None


def schedule_expr(job: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str | None:
    if not job:
        return None
    schedule = job.get("schedule")
    if isinstance(schedule, dict):
        return schedule.get("expr") or schedule.get("display")
    if isinstance(schedule, str):
        return schedule
    return job.get("schedule_display")


def evaluate_system_safety(config: dict[str, Any], jobs_doc: dict[str, Any]) -> list[SafetyCheck]:
    monitor = find_job(jobs_doc, MONITOR_JOB_NAME)
    heartbeat = find_job(jobs_doc, HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME)
    guard = find_job(jobs_doc, DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME)
    risk_filter = config.get("risk_filter") or {}

    checks = [
        SafetyCheck("Paper-only config", config.get("paper_only") is True, f"paper_only={config.get('paper_only')!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Live orders disabled", config.get("live_orders_enabled") is False, f"live_orders_enabled={config.get('live_orders_enabled')!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Monitor job exists", monitor is not None, MONITOR_JOB_NAME),
        SafetyCheck("Monitor is script-only", bool(monitor and monitor.get("no_agent") is True), f"no_agent={None if monitor is None else monitor.get('no_agent')!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Monitor has no model/provider", bool(monitor and not monitor.get("model") and not monitor.get("provider") and not monitor.get("base_url")), f"model/provider/base_url absent={bool(monitor and not monitor.get('model') and not monitor.get('provider') and not monitor.get('base_url'))}"),
        SafetyCheck("Monitor schedule", schedule_expr(monitor) == "* * * * 1-5", f"schedule={schedule_expr(monitor)!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Entry cadence", config.get("entry_scan_interval_minutes") == 5, f"entry_scan_interval_minutes={config.get('entry_scan_interval_minutes')!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Open-trade poll cadence", config.get("poll_interval_seconds") == 15, f"poll_interval_seconds={config.get('poll_interval_seconds')!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("30-minute LLM heartbeat", schedule_expr(heartbeat) == "0,30 4-10 * * 1-5", f"schedule={schedule_expr(heartbeat)!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Script-only drift guard", bool(guard and guard.get("no_agent") is True), f"no_agent={None if guard is None else guard.get('no_agent')!r}"),
        SafetyCheck("Spread filter enabled", bool(risk_filter.get("enabled") is True and risk_filter.get("enforce_spread_filter") is True), f"risk_filter.enabled={risk_filter.get('enabled')!r}, enforce_spread_filter={risk_filter.get('enforce_spread_filter')!r}"),
    ]
    return checks


def inr(value: Any) -> str:
    if value is None:
        return "n/a"
    try:
        amount = Decimal(str(value))
    except Exception:
        return str(value)
    sign = "-" if amount < 0 else ""
    amount = abs(amount)
    return f"{sign}₹{amount:,.2f}"


def pct_from_open(ltp: Any, open_value: Any) -> Decimal | None:
    try:
        ltp_dec = Decimal(str(ltp))
        open_dec = Decimal(str(open_value))
    except Exception:
        return None
    if open_dec <= 0:
        return None
    return ((ltp_dec - open_dec) / open_dec * Decimal("100")).quantize(Decimal("0.01"))


def age_status(age_seconds: Any, stale_limit: int) -> tuple[str, str]:
    if age_seconds is None:
        return "UNKNOWN", "No quote timestamp"
    try:
        age = float(age_seconds)
    except Exception:
        return "UNKNOWN", str(age_seconds)
    if age <= stale_limit:
        return "OK", f"{age:.0f}s old"
    if age <= stale_limit * 2:
        return "WARN", f"{age:.0f}s old"
    return "STALE", f"{age:.0f}s old"


def get_db_snapshot() -> dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:
    return {
        "campaign": fetch_rows(
            """
            select campaign_id, name, starting_capital, active, max_daily_loss,
                   max_open_positions, max_trades_per_day, stop_loss_pct, target_pct,
                   no_new_trades_after, force_exit_time, poll_interval_seconds, updated_at
            from research.option_paper_campaigns
            order by updated_at desc
            limit 1
            """
        ),
        "banknifty_quote": fetch_rows(
            """
            select symbol, ltp, open, high, low, close, volume, quote_time, updated_at,
                   extract(epoch from (now() - updated_at)) as age_seconds
            from market.quotes
            where symbol='NSE:NIFTYBANK-INDEX'
            """
        ),
        "open_trades": fetch_rows(
            """
            select t.option_trade_id, t.symbol, t.option_type, t.expiry, t.strike,
                   t.entry_premium, q.ltp as current_premium, t.stop_premium, t.target_premium,
                   t.highest_premium, t.quantity, t.premium_value, t.entry_time,
                   t.strategy_version,
                   case when q.ltp is not null then (q.ltp - t.entry_premium) * t.quantity else null end as unrealized_pnl,
                   extract(epoch from (now() - q.updated_at)) as quote_age_seconds
            from research.option_paper_trades t
            left join market.quotes q on q.symbol = t.symbol
            where t.status='open'
            order by t.entry_time desc
            """
        ),
        "risk_today": fetch_rows(
            """
            select count(*) filter (where created_at at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata' >= (now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')::date) as trades_today,
                   coalesce(sum(case when status='closed' and exit_time at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata' >= (now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')::date then realized_pnl else 0 end), 0) as realized_today,
                   count(*) filter (where status='open') as open_count,
                   count(*) as total_trades
            from research.option_paper_trades
            """
        ),
        "latest_events": fetch_rows(
            """
            select e.event_time, e.event_type, e.premium, e.quantity, e.message,
                   t.symbol, t.option_type
            from research.option_paper_trade_events e
            left join research.option_paper_trades t on t.option_trade_id = e.option_trade_id
            order by e.event_time desc
            limit 50
            """
        ),
        "daily_snapshots": fetch_rows(
            """
            select snapshot_date, starting_capital, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, equity,
                   open_positions, closed_positions
            from research.option_paper_daily_snapshots
            order by snapshot_date desc
            limit 30
            """
        ),
        "constituent_quotes": fetch_rows(
            """
            with configured as (
              select jsonb_array_elements(%s::jsonb) as item
            )
            select item->>'symbol' as symbol,
                   item->>'fyers_symbol' as fyers_symbol,
                   q.ltp, q.open, q.updated_at,
                   extract(epoch from (now() - q.updated_at)) as age_seconds,
                   case when q.open is not null and q.open > 0 then round(((q.ltp - q.open) / q.open * 100)::numeric, 2) else null end as pct_from_open
            from configured
            left join market.quotes q on q.symbol = item->>'fyers_symbol'
            order by pct_from_open desc nulls last
            """,
            [json.dumps(load_json_file(CONFIG_PATH).get("constituents") or [])],
        ),
    }


def render_status_badge(st: Any, check: SafetyCheck) -> None:
    if check.ok:
        st.success(f"{check.name}: OK — {check.detail}")
    else:
        st.error(f"{check.name}: FAIL — {check.detail}")


def main() -> None:  # pragma: no cover - exercised by Streamlit smoke import plus manual run
    import streamlit as st
    import streamlit.components.v1 as components

    st.set_page_config(page_title="BankNifty Options Paper Monitor", layout="wide")
    st.title("BankNifty Options Paper Monitor")
    st.caption("Read-only dashboard. No LLM calls. No FYERS order calls. PostgreSQL SELECT-only access.")

    with st.sidebar:
        st.header("Refresh")
        refresh_seconds = st.number_input("Auto-refresh seconds", min_value=0, max_value=300, value=15, step=5)
        if refresh_seconds:
            components.html(f"<script>setTimeout(() => window.parent.location.reload(), {int(refresh_seconds) * 1000});</script>", height=0)
        st.write(f"IST now: {datetime.now(IST).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}")
        st.write(f"Project: `{PROJECT_ROOT}`")
        st.write(f"DB: `127.0.0.1:55432/finance_tracker`")

    try:
        config = load_json_file(CONFIG_PATH)
        jobs_doc = load_json_file(JOBS_PATH)
        snapshot = get_db_snapshot()
    except Exception as exc:
        st.exception(exc)
        return

    safety_checks = evaluate_system_safety(config, jobs_doc)
    safe = all(check.ok for check in safety_checks)
    if safe:
        st.success("System safety checks passed: deterministic paper monitor is script-only and live orders are disabled.")
    else:
        st.error("System safety checks failed. Do not trust paper-monitor output until fixed.")

    tab_health, tab_live, tab_positions, tab_events, tab_equity, tab_cron = st.tabs([
        "System health", "Live market", "Open position", "Events", "Equity", "Cron/config"
    ])

    with tab_health:
        cols = st.columns(3)
        for idx, check in enumerate(safety_checks):
            with cols[idx % 3]:
                render_status_badge(st, check)

        campaign = snapshot["campaign"][0] if snapshot["campaign"] else {}
        risk = snapshot["risk_today"][0] if snapshot["risk_today"] else {}
        m1, m2, m3, m4 = st.columns(4)
        m1.metric("Starting capital", inr(campaign.get("starting_capital")))
        m2.metric("Realized today", inr(risk.get("realized_today")))
        m3.metric("Trades today", f"{risk.get('trades_today', 0)} / {config.get('max_trades_per_day')}")
        m4.metric("Open positions", f"{risk.get('open_count', 0)} / {config.get('max_open_positions')}")

    with tab_live:
        quote = snapshot["banknifty_quote"][0] if snapshot["banknifty_quote"] else {}
        age_label, age_detail = age_status(quote.get("age_seconds"), int(config.get("quote_stale_seconds", 90)))
        pct = pct_from_open(quote.get("ltp"), quote.get("open"))
        q1, q2, q3, q4 = st.columns(4)
        q1.metric("BankNifty LTP", inr(quote.get("ltp")))
        q2.metric("% from open", "n/a" if pct is None else f"{pct}%")
        q3.metric("Quote freshness", age_label, age_detail)
        q4.metric("Volume", str(quote.get("volume") or "n/a"))

        constituents = snapshot["constituent_quotes"]
        fresh = [row for row in constituents if row.get("age_seconds") is not None and float(row["age_seconds"]) <= float(config.get("quote_stale_seconds", 90))]
        coverage_pct = (len(fresh) / len(constituents) * 100) if constituents else 0
        st.metric("Fresh constituent coverage", f"{coverage_pct:.1f}%", f"{len(fresh)} / {len(constituents)}")
        st.subheader("Constituent movers")
        st.dataframe(constituents, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)

    with tab_positions:
        open_trades = snapshot["open_trades"]
        if not open_trades:
            st.info("No open BankNifty option paper trades.")
        else:
            st.dataframe(open_trades, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)

    with tab_events:
        st.dataframe(snapshot["latest_events"], use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)

    with tab_equity:
        daily = list(reversed(snapshot["daily_snapshots"]))
        if daily:
            st.line_chart({str(row["snapshot_date"]): float(row["equity"] or 0) for row in daily})
        st.dataframe(snapshot["daily_snapshots"], use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)

    with tab_cron:
        jobs = [find_job(jobs_doc, name) for name in [MONITOR_JOB_NAME, HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME, DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME]]
        compact_jobs = [
            {
                "id": job.get("id"),
                "name": job.get("name"),
                "enabled": job.get("enabled"),
                "state": job.get("state"),
                "schedule": schedule_expr(job),
                "script": job.get("script"),
                "no_agent": job.get("no_agent"),
                "model": job.get("model"),
                "provider": job.get("provider"),
                "last_run_at": job.get("last_run_at"),
                "last_status": job.get("last_status"),
                "next_run_at": job.get("next_run_at"),
            }
            for job in jobs if job
        ]
        st.dataframe(compact_jobs, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)
        st.subheader("Runtime config")
        st.json({
            "campaign_name": config.get("campaign_name"),
            "strategy_version": config.get("strategy_version"),
            "paper_only": config.get("paper_only"),
            "live_orders_enabled": config.get("live_orders_enabled"),
            "entry_scan_interval_minutes": config.get("entry_scan_interval_minutes"),
            "poll_interval_seconds": config.get("poll_interval_seconds"),
            "max_trades_per_day": config.get("max_trades_per_day"),
            "max_daily_loss": config.get("max_daily_loss"),
            "max_trade_loss": config.get("max_trade_loss"),
            "risk_filter": config.get("risk_filter"),
        })


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /opt/data/finance-db

# Read-only dashboard. Bind to loopback by default; use SSH tunnel/VPN/reverse proxy with auth.
# Example SSH tunnel from your laptop:
#   ssh -L 8501:127.0.0.1:8501 <vps-user>@<vps-host>
# Then open http://127.0.0.1:8501 locally.

HOST="${BANKNIFTY_DASHBOARD_HOST:-127.0.0.1}"
PORT="${BANKNIFTY_DASHBOARD_PORT:-8501}"

exec uv run --with streamlit streamlit run dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py \
  --server.address "$HOST" \
  --server.port "$PORT" \
  --server.headless true

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import importlib.util

from __future__ import annotations

import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path

import sys

import pytest

MODULE_PATH = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "dashboard" / "banknifty_options_dashboard.py"
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("banknifty_options_dashboard", MODULE_PATH)
dashboard = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
assert spec and spec.loader
sys.modules["banknifty_options_dashboard"] = dashboard
spec.loader.exec_module(dashboard)


def job(name, *, no_agent=True, schedule="* * * * 1-5", script="x.sh", model=None, provider=None, base_url=None):
    return {
        "name": name,
        "enabled": True,
        "no_agent": no_agent,
        "script": script,
        "model": model,
        "provider": provider,
        "base_url": base_url,
        "schedule": {"expr": schedule},
    }


def safe_config():
    return {
        "paper_only": True,
        "live_orders_enabled": False,
        "entry_scan_interval_minutes": 5,
        "poll_interval_seconds": 15,
        "risk_filter": {"enabled": True, "enforce_spread_filter": True},
    }


def safe_jobs():
    return {
        "jobs": [
            job(dashboard.MONITOR_JOB_NAME, no_agent=True, schedule="* * * * 1-5"),
            job(dashboard.HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME, no_agent=None, schedule="0,30 4-10 * * 1-5"),
            job(dashboard.DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME, no_agent=True, schedule="*/5 4-10 * * 1-5"),
        ]
    }


def test_evaluate_system_safety_all_ok_for_current_design():
    checks = dashboard.evaluate_system_safety(safe_config(), safe_jobs())
    assert checks
    assert all(check.ok for check in checks)


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "mutator, failing_name",
    [
        (lambda cfg, jobs: cfg.update({"paper_only": False}), "Paper-only config"),
        (lambda cfg, jobs: cfg.update({"live_orders_enabled": True}), "Live orders disabled"),
        (lambda cfg, jobs: jobs["jobs"][0].update({"no_agent": False}), "Monitor is script-only"),
        (lambda cfg, jobs: jobs["jobs"][0].update({"model": {"model": "expensive-model"}}), "Monitor has no model/provider"),
        (lambda cfg, jobs: jobs["jobs"][1]["schedule"].update({"expr": "* * * * 1-5"}), "30-minute LLM heartbeat"),
    ],
)
def test_evaluate_system_safety_detects_drift(mutator, failing_name):
    cfg = safe_config()
    jobs = safe_jobs()
    mutator(cfg, jobs)
    checks = dashboard.evaluate_system_safety(cfg, jobs)
    failed = {check.name for check in checks if not check.ok}
    assert failing_name in failed


def test_assert_readonly_sql_rejects_writes():
    dashboard.assert_readonly_sql("select 1")
    dashboard.assert_readonly_sql("with x as (select 1) select * from x")
    with pytest.raises(dashboard.DashboardError):
        dashboard.assert_readonly_sql("update research.option_paper_trades set status='x'")
    with pytest.raises(dashboard.DashboardError):
        dashboard.assert_readonly_sql("select 1; delete from research.option_paper_trades")


def test_formatting_helpers():
    assert dashboard.inr(1234.5) == "₹1,234.50"
    assert dashboard.inr(-10) == "-₹10.00"
    assert dashboard.pct_from_open(110, 100) == dashboard.Decimal("10.00")
    assert dashboard.age_status(30, 90)[0] == "OK"
    assert dashboard.age_status(100, 90)[0] == "WARN"
    assert dashboard.age_status(300, 90)[0] == "STALE"

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /opt/data/finance-db

# Run only during the intraday BankNifty options window. Paper only.
# Adaptive cadence:
# - before entry: evaluate entry/status only on configured 5-minute boundaries
# - after a paper entry exists: monitor the open trade every 15 seconds
dow="$(TZ=Asia/Kolkata date +%u)"
hhmm="$(TZ=Asia/Kolkata date +%H%M)"
if [[ "$dow" -gt 5 || "$hhmm" < "0920" || "$hhmm" > "1520" ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

mkdir -p logs
if ! ./scripts/psql.sh -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55432 -d finance_tracker -Atqc 'select 1' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ./scripts/start-postgres.sh >> logs/banknifty_options_postgres_autostart.log 2>&1 || {
    echo "BankNifty options paper tick skipped: PostgreSQL unavailable on 127.0.0.1:55432"
    exit 1
  }
fi

exec 9>/tmp/banknifty_options_paper_tick.lock
if ! flock -n 9; then
  exit 0
fi

FYERS_LOG_PATH=/tmp/ timeout 58s uv run python scripts/banknifty_options_paper.py \
  --mode tick \
  --refresh-quotes \
  --quiet-no-change \
  --loop-seconds 55

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /opt/data/finance-db

python - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations
import json
import re
import subprocess
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo

IST = ZoneInfo('Asia/Kolkata')
PROJECT = Path('/opt/data/finance-db')
PROFILE_SCRIPTS = Path('/opt/data/profiles/finance/scripts')
CONFIG = PROJECT / 'config' / 'banknifty_options_paper.json'
MONITOR_WRAPPER = PROFILE_SCRIPTS / 'banknifty_options_paper_tick.sh'
PROJECT_MONITOR = PROJECT / 'scripts' / 'banknifty_options_paper_tick.sh'
PY_MONITOR = PROJECT / 'scripts' / 'banknifty_options_paper.py'

print('## BankNifty deterministic monitor audit input')
print(f"time_ist: {datetime.now(IST).isoformat(timespec='seconds')}")

try:
    data = json.loads(CONFIG.read_text())
    print('config_status: OK')
    for key in [
        'strategy_version', 'paper_only', 'live_orders_enabled',
        'entry_scan_interval_minutes', 'poll_interval_seconds',
        'max_trades_per_day', 'max_daily_loss', 'max_trade_loss',
        'min_constituent_coverage_pct', 'min_directional_weight_pct',
        'min_index_confirmation_pct', 'constituent_weight_mode',
    ]:
        print(f"config.{key}: {data.get(key)}")
    print(f"config.constituents_count: {len(data.get('constituents') or [])}")
except Exception as exc:
    print(f'config_status: ERROR {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')

banned = [
    r'\bopenai\b', r'\banthropic\b', r'\bopenrouter\b', r'\bgemini\b',
    r'/chat/completions', r'\bcodex\b', r'\bllm\b',
]
allow_notes = ['The word hermes is allowlisted only as the local PostgreSQL user/default DSN, not as an LLM call.']
print('allowlist_notes: ' + '; '.join(allow_notes))
for path in [MONITOR_WRAPPER, PROJECT_MONITOR, PY_MONITOR]:
    try:
        text = path.read_text(errors='ignore').lower()
        hits = sorted({pat for pat in banned if re.search(pat, text)})
        print(f'script_scan.{path}: ' + ('OK no direct LLM/API-completion terms' if not hits else 'WARN hits=' + ','.join(hits)))
    except Exception as exc:
        print(f'script_scan.{path}: ERROR {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')

psql = PROJECT / 'scripts' / 'psql.sh'
def run_sql(sql: str) -> str:
    return subprocess.check_output([
        str(psql), '-h', '127.0.0.1', '-p', '55432', '-d', 'finance_tracker', '-Atqc', sql
    ], cwd=str(PROJECT), text=True, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, timeout=20).strip()

try:
    print('db_status: ' + ('OK' if run_sql('select 1') == '1' else 'WARN unexpected response'))
except Exception as exc:
    print(f'db_status: ERROR {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')

try:
    latest_quote = run_sql("""
        select coalesce(symbol,'n/a') || '|' || coalesce(ltp::text,'n/a') || '|' || coalesce(updated_at::text,'n/a')
        from market.quotes where symbol='NSE:NIFTYBANK-INDEX'
    """)
    print('banknifty_quote: ' + (latest_quote or 'MISSING'))
except Exception as exc:
    print(f'banknifty_quote: ERROR {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')

try:
    open_trades = run_sql("""
        select coalesce(string_agg(symbol || ' ' || option_type || ' entry=' || entry_premium::text || ' sl=' || stop_premium::text || ' target=' || target_premium::text, '; '), 'none')
        from research.option_paper_trades where status='open'
    """)
    print('open_paper_option_trades: ' + (open_trades or 'none'))
except Exception as exc:
    print(f'open_paper_option_trades: ERROR {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')

try:
    latest_event = run_sql("""
        select coalesce(event_type,'n/a') || '|' || coalesce(event_time::text,'n/a') || '|' || left(coalesce(message,''), 180)
        from research.option_paper_trade_events order by event_time desc limit 1
    """)
    print('latest_option_event: ' + (latest_event or 'none'))
except Exception as exc:
    print(f'latest_option_event: ERROR {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')
PY

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	# Script-only drift guard for Apoorv's BankNifty options paper monitor.
5	# Cron should run this with no_agent=true. It stays silent when everything is OK
6	# and prints a WARN report only if the high-frequency monitor can spend LLM
7	# tokens, stops being paper-only, or contains direct LLM/order-call patterns.
8	
9	python - "$@" <<'PY'
10	from __future__ import annotations
11	
12	import json
13	import re
14	import sys
15	from datetime import datetime
16	from pathlib import Path
17	from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
18	
19	IST = ZoneInfo("Asia/Kolkata")
20	PROFILE = Path("/opt/data/profiles/finance")
21	PROJECT = Path("/opt/data/finance-db")
22	JOBS_JSON = PROFILE / "cron" / "jobs.json"
23	PROFILE_SCRIPTS = PROFILE / "scripts"
24	MONITOR_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options deterministic paper monitor: 5m entry / 15s open-trade monitor"
25	HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options LLM heartbeat: cron/script safety audit"
26	MONITOR_SCRIPT = "banknifty_options_paper_tick.sh"
27	HEARTBEAT_SCRIPT = "banknifty_options_heartbeat_audit.sh"
28	CONFIG = PROJECT / "config" / "banknifty_options_paper.json"
29	SCRIPT_PATHS = [
30	    PROFILE_SCRIPTS / MONITOR_SCRIPT,
31	    PROJECT / "scripts" / MONITOR_SCRIPT,
32	    PROJECT / "scripts" / "banknifty_options_paper.py",
33	]
34	
35	# Actual call/import/client patterns, not generic words in comments like "No LLM".
36	LLM_PATTERNS = [
37	    ("openai_sdk", re.compile(r"(^|[^a-z0-9_])(?:from\s+openai|import\s+openai|openai\.)", re.I | re.M)),
38	    ("anthropic_sdk", re.compile(r"(^|[^a-z0-9_])(?:from\s+anthropic|import\s+anthropic|anthropic\.)", re.I | re.M)),
39	    ("openrouter_endpoint", re.compile(r"openrouter|api\.openai\.com|/chat/completions|chat\.completions|responses\.create", re.I)),
40	    ("gemini_sdk", re.compile(r"(^|[^a-z0-9_])(?:google\.generativeai|genai\.|gemini)", re.I | re.M)),
41	    ("ollama_api", re.compile(r"ollama|localhost:11434|127\.0\.0\.1:11434", re.I)),
42	    ("agent_cli", re.compile(r"\b(hermes\s+chat|codex\s+exec|claude\s+code|claude\s+-p)\b", re.I)),
43	]
44	ORDER_PATTERNS = [
45	    ("place_order", re.compile(r"\bplace_order\s*\(", re.I)),
46	    ("modify_order", re.compile(r"\bmodify_order\s*\(", re.I)),
47	    ("cancel_order", re.compile(r"\bcancel_order\s*\(", re.I)),
48	    ("exit_order", re.compile(r"\bexit_order\s*\(", re.I)),
49	    ("create_order", re.compile(r"\bcreate_order\s*\(", re.I)),
50	]
51	
52	verbose = "--verbose" in sys.argv
53	issues: list[str] = []
54	notes: list[str] = []
55	
56	
57	def add_issue(msg: str) -> None:
58	    issues.append(msg)
59	
60	
61	def load_json(path: Path):
62	    try:
63	        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
64	    except Exception as exc:
65	        add_issue(f"cannot read {path}: {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
66	        return None
67	
68	jobs_doc = load_json(JOBS_JSON)
69	jobs = jobs_doc.get("jobs", []) if isinstance(jobs_doc, dict) else []
70	
71	
72	def find_job(name: str):
73	    matches = [job for job in jobs if job.get("name") == name]
74	    if not matches:
75	        add_issue(f"missing cron job: {name}")
76	        return None
77	    if len(matches) > 1:
78	        add_issue(f"duplicate cron jobs named {name}: {[job.get('id') for job in matches]}")
79	    return matches[0]
80	
81	monitor = find_job(MONITOR_JOB_NAME)
82	heartbeat = find_job(HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME)
83	
84	if monitor:
85	    if monitor.get("enabled") is not True:
86	        add_issue(f"monitor job {monitor.get('id')} is not enabled")
87	    if monitor.get("no_agent") is not True:
88	        add_issue(f"monitor job {monitor.get('id')} no_agent is {monitor.get('no_agent')!r}, expected true")
89	    if monitor.get("script") != MONITOR_SCRIPT:
90	        add_issue(f"monitor job script is {monitor.get('script')!r}, expected {MONITOR_SCRIPT}")
91	    if monitor.get("model") is not None or monitor.get("provider") is not None or monitor.get("base_url") is not None:
92	        add_issue(f"monitor job has model/provider/base_url set: model={monitor.get('model')!r} provider={monitor.get('provider')!r} base_url={monitor.get('base_url')!r}")
93	    schedule = monitor.get("schedule") or {}
94	    if schedule.get("expr") != "* * * * 1-5":
95	        add_issue(f"monitor job schedule is {schedule.get('expr')!r}, expected '* * * * 1-5' wrapper")
96	    notes.append(f"monitor job {monitor.get('id')} no_agent={monitor.get('no_agent')} script={monitor.get('script')} schedule={schedule.get('expr')}")
97	
98	if heartbeat:
99	    if heartbeat.get("enabled") is not True:
100	        add_issue(f"heartbeat job {heartbeat.get('id')} is not enabled")
101	    if heartbeat.get("script") != HEARTBEAT_SCRIPT:
102	        add_issue(f"heartbeat job script is {heartbeat.get('script')!r}, expected {HEARTBEAT_SCRIPT}")
103	    hb_expr = (heartbeat.get("schedule") or {}).get("expr")
104	    if hb_expr != "0,30 4-10 * * 1-5":
105	        add_issue(f"heartbeat schedule is {hb_expr!r}, expected 30-minute market-hours audit")
106	    # This one is intentionally agent/LLM-driven, but low frequency. Guard against accidental high-frequency schedule.
107	    if hb_expr in {"* * * * *", "* * * * 1-5"}:
108	        add_issue("heartbeat LLM job appears high-frequency; expected every 30 minutes only")
109	    notes.append(f"heartbeat job {heartbeat.get('id')} no_agent={heartbeat.get('no_agent')} script={heartbeat.get('script')} schedule={hb_expr}")
110	
111	config = load_json(CONFIG)
112	if isinstance(config, dict):
113	    if config.get("paper_only") is not True:
114	        add_issue(f"config paper_only is {config.get('paper_only')!r}, expected boolean true")
115	    if config.get("live_orders_enabled") is not False:
116	        add_issue(f"config live_orders_enabled is {config.get('live_orders_enabled')!r}, expected boolean false")
117	    if config.get("entry_scan_interval_minutes") != 5:
118	        add_issue(f"entry_scan_interval_minutes is {config.get('entry_scan_interval_minutes')!r}, expected 5")
119	    if config.get("poll_interval_seconds") != 15:
120	        add_issue(f"poll_interval_seconds is {config.get('poll_interval_seconds')!r}, expected 15")
121	    rf = config.get("risk_filter") or {}
122	    expected_rf = {
123	        "enabled": True,
124	        "enforce_spread_filter": True,
125	        "require_greeks": False,
126	        "min_abs_delta": 0,
127	        "max_abs_theta": 0,
128	        "max_iv": 0,
129	        "require_iv": False,
130	    }
131	    for key, expected in expected_rf.items():
132	        if rf.get(key) != expected:
133	            add_issue(f"risk_filter.{key} is {rf.get(key)!r}, expected {expected!r}")
134	    notes.append("config paper_only=true live_orders_enabled=false cadence=5m/15s")
135	
136	for path in SCRIPT_PATHS:
137	    try:
138	        text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
139	    except Exception as exc:
140	        add_issue(f"cannot read monitor script {path}: {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}")
141	        continue
142	    for name, pattern in LLM_PATTERNS:
143	        if pattern.search(text):
144	            add_issue(f"direct LLM/API pattern {name} found in {path}")
145	    for name, pattern in ORDER_PATTERNS:
146	        if pattern.search(text):
147	            add_issue(f"live-order call pattern {name} found in {path}")
148	notes.append("script scan checked profile wrapper, project wrapper, and Python monitor")
149	
150	if issues:
151	    print("## BankNifty LLM guard WARN")
152	    print(f"time_ist: {datetime.now(IST).isoformat(timespec='seconds')}")
153	    print("Issues:")
154	    for issue in issues:
155	        print(f"- {issue}")
156	    print("Notes:")
157	    for note in notes:
158	        print(f"- {note}")
159	elif verbose:
160	    print("## BankNifty LLM guard OK")
161	    print(f"time_ist: {datetime.now(IST).isoformat(timespec='seconds')}")
162	    for note in notes:
163	        print(f"- {note}")
164	# else: silent success for no_agent cron watchdog
165	PY
166

You are reviewing the BankNifty options paper-monitoring system and its new read-only Streamlit dashboard in /opt/data/finance-db. This is a PAPER-TRADING-ONLY system. Your focus: Python code quality, correctness, test coverage, runtime/import failures, maintainability.

STRICT SAFETY RULES (do not violate):
- Do NOT place/modify/cancel/simulate any live FYERS order; do not call any live order API.
- Do NOT read or print .env, auth tokens, API keys, FYERS credentials, or account identifiers.
- Do NOT edit any code. Read-only review only.
- Read-only tests and read-only SQL via existing helper scripts are OK.

Files to inspect (read them fully):
- dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py
- scripts/run_banknifty_options_dashboard.sh
- tests/test_banknifty_options_dashboard.py
- scripts/banknifty_options_paper.py  (large ~74KB — read it thoroughly)
- scripts/banknifty_options_paper_tick.sh
- config/banknifty_options_paper.json
- tests/test_banknifty_options_paper.py

Already established (don't redo): `uv run pytest tests/test_banknifty_options_dashboard.py tests/test_banknifty_options_paper.py -q` => 55 passed. `uv run python -m py_compile dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py scripts/banknifty_options_paper.py` => OK.

What I need from you:
1. Concrete correctness bugs (logic errors, off-by-one, wrong SQL joins, decimal/float mixing, timezone handling, exception swallowing, resource leaks like unclosed connections).
2. Test coverage gaps — what important behavior in the paper monitor and dashboard is NOT tested? Are the tests meaningful or shallow? Any brittle/over-mocked tests?
3. Runtime/import risks — anything that would fail under realistic conditions (missing module, None handling, empty result sets, type coercion).
4. Maintainability concerns — duplication, dead code, magic numbers, unclear naming. Keep this brief; prioritize correctness.

You MAY run read-only commands: `uv run pytest -q`, `uv run python -m py_compile`, grep, reading files. You may import dashboard helpers in a python one-liner to smoke-test pure functions (evaluate_system_safety, assert_readonly_sql, inr, pct_from_open, age_status) but do NOT call get_db_snapshot against a live DB unless trivially read-only — and never touch order APIs.

Return a concise structured findings list. For each finding give: Severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low/Info), file:line, what's wrong, why it matters, recommended fix. If an area is clean, say what you checked and why it passed. Be adversarial and specific with line numbers.

You are reviewing the BankNifty options paper-monitoring system and its new read-only Streamlit dashboard in /opt/data/finance-db. This is a PAPER-TRADING-ONLY system. Your focus: Python code quality, correctness, test coverage, runtime/import failures, maintainability.

STRICT SAFETY RULES (do not violate):
- Do NOT place/modify/cancel/simulate any live FYERS order; do not call any live order API.
- Do NOT read or print .env, auth tokens, API keys, FYERS credentials, or account identifiers.
- Do NOT edit any code. Read-only review only.
- Read-only tests and read-only SQL via existing helper scripts are OK.

Files to inspect (read them fully):
- dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py
- scripts/run_banknifty_options_dashboard.sh
- tests/test_banknifty_options_dashboard.py
- scripts/banknifty_options_paper.py  (large ~74KB — read it thoroughly)
- scripts/banknifty_options_paper_tick.sh
- config/banknifty_options_paper.json
- tests/test_banknifty_options_paper.py

Already established (don't redo): `uv run pytest tests/test_banknifty_options_dashboard.py tests/test_banknifty_options_paper.py -q` => 55 passed. `uv run python -m py_compile dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py scripts/banknifty_options_paper.py` => OK.

What I need from you:
1. Concrete correctness bugs (logic errors, off-by-one, wrong SQL joins, decimal/float mixing, timezone handling, exception swallowing, resource leaks like unclosed connections).
2. Test coverage gaps — what important behavior in the paper monitor and dashboard is NOT tested? Are the tests meaningful or shallow? Any brittle/over-mocked tests?
3. Runtime/import risks — anything that would fail under realistic conditions (missing module, None handling, empty result sets, type coercion).
4. Maintainability concerns — duplication, dead code, magic numbers, unclear naming. Keep this brief; prioritize correctness.

You MAY run read-only commands: `uv run pytest -q`, `uv run python -m py_compile`, grep, reading files. You may import dashboard helpers in a python one-liner to smoke-test pure functions (evaluate_system_safety, assert_readonly_sql, inr, pct_from_open, age_status) but do NOT call get_db_snapshot against a live DB unless trivially read-only — and never touch order APIs.

Return a concise structured findings list. For each finding give: Severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low/Info), file:line, what's wrong, why it matters, recommended fix. If an area is clean, say what you checked and why it passed. Be adversarial and specific with line numbers.

1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""Read-only Streamlit dashboard for the BankNifty options paper monitor.
3	
4	Safety design:
5	- No FYERS order calls.
6	- No LLM/API calls.
7	- Database access is SELECT-only and opens a read-only transaction.
8	- Cron/config files are read from local disk only.
9	
10	Run with:
11	    uv run --with streamlit streamlit run dashboard/banknifty_options_dashboard.py \
12	      --server.address 127.0.0.1 --server.port 8501
13	"""
14	from __future__ import annotations
15	
16	import json
17	import os
18	from dataclasses import dataclass
19	from datetime import datetime, timezone
20	from decimal import Decimal
21	from pathlib import Path
22	from typing import Any, Iterable
23	from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
24	
25	import psycopg
26	from psycopg.rows import dict_row
27	
28	try:
29	    from dotenv import load_dotenv
30	except Exception:  # pragma: no cover - dependency exists in project, fallback for resilience
31	    load_dotenv = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
32	
33	PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
34	PROFILE_ROOT = Path("/opt/data/profiles/finance")
35	CONFIG_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / "config" / "banknifty_options_paper.json"
36	JOBS_PATH = PROFILE_ROOT / "cron" / "jobs.json"
37	DEFAULT_DB_PORT = str(55_000 + 432)
38	DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://" + "hermes" + "@" + "127.0.0.1" + ":" + DEFAULT_DB_PORT + "/" + "finance_tracker"
39	IST = ZoneInfo("Asia/Kolkata")
40	MONITOR_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options deterministic paper monitor: 5m entry / 15s open-trade monitor"
41	HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options LLM heartbeat: cron/script safety audit"
42	DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME = "BankNifty options script-only LLM drift guard"
43	
44	
45	@dataclass(frozen=True)
46	class SafetyCheck:
47	    name: str
48	    ok: bool
49	    detail: str
50	
51	
52	class DashboardError(RuntimeError):
53	    """Raised for dashboard data loading issues."""
54	
55	
56	def load_json_file(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
57	    try:
58	        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
59	    except FileNotFoundError as exc:
60	        raise DashboardError(f"Missing file: {path}") from exc
61	    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
62	        raise DashboardError(f"Invalid JSON in {path}: {exc}") from exc
63	
64	
65	def database_url() -> str:
66	    if load_dotenv is not None:
67	        load_dotenv(PROJECT_ROOT / ".env")
68	    return os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL)
69	
70	
71	def connect_readonly() -> psycopg.Connection:
72	    conn = psycopg.connect(database_url(), row_factory=dict_row)
73	    # Defense-in-depth: if a future dashboard query accidentally writes, Postgres refuses it.
74	    conn.execute("SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION READ ONLY")
75	    return conn
76	
77	
78	def assert_readonly_sql(sql: str) -> None:
79	    stripped = sql.lstrip().lower()
80	    allowed = ("select", "with", "show")
81	    if not stripped.startswith(allowed):
82	        raise DashboardError("Dashboard SQL must be read-only SELECT/WITH/SHOW")
83	    banned = ("insert ", "update ", "delete ", "drop ", "alter ", "create ", "truncate ", "grant ", "revoke ")
84	    if any(token in stripped for token in banned):
85	        raise DashboardError("Dashboard SQL contains a banned write/DDL token")
86	
87	
88	def fetch_rows(sql: str, params: Iterable[Any] | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
89	    assert_readonly_sql(sql)
90	    with connect_readonly() as conn:
91	        with conn.cursor() as cur:
92	            cur.execute(sql, tuple(params or ()))
93	            return list(cur.fetchall())
94	
95	
96	def find_job(jobs_doc: dict[str, Any], name: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
97	    for job in jobs_doc.get("jobs", []):
98	        if job.get("name") == name:
99	            return job
100	    return None
101	
102	
103	def schedule_expr(job: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str | None:
104	    if not job:
105	        return None
106	    schedule = job.get("schedule")
107	    if isinstance(schedule, dict):
108	        return schedule.get("expr") or schedule.get("display")
109	    if isinstance(schedule, str):
110	        return schedule
111	    return job.get("schedule_display")
112	
113	
114	def evaluate_system_safety(config: dict[str, Any], jobs_doc: dict[str, Any]) -> list[SafetyCheck]:
115	    monitor = find_job(jobs_doc, MONITOR_JOB_NAME)
116	    heartbeat = find_job(jobs_doc, HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME)
117	    guard = find_job(jobs_doc, DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME)
118	    risk_filter = config.get("risk_filter") or {}
119	
120	    checks = [
121	        SafetyCheck("Paper-only config", config.get("paper_only") is True, f"paper_only={config.get('paper_only')!r}"),
122	        SafetyCheck("Live orders disabled", config.get("live_orders_enabled") is False, f"live_orders_enabled={config.get('live_orders_enabled')!r}"),
123	        SafetyCheck("Monitor job exists", monitor is not None, MONITOR_JOB_NAME),
124	        SafetyCheck("Monitor is script-only", bool(monitor and monitor.get("no_agent") is True), f"no_agent={None if monitor is None else monitor.get('no_agent')!r}"),
125	        SafetyCheck("Monitor has no model/provider", bool(monitor and not monitor.get("model") and not monitor.get("provider") and not monitor.get("base_url")), f"model/provider/base_url absent={bool(monitor and not monitor.get('model') and not monitor.get('provider') and not monitor.get('base_url'))}"),
126	        SafetyCheck("Monitor schedule", schedule_expr(monitor) == "* * * * 1-5", f"schedule={schedule_expr(monitor)!r}"),
127	        SafetyCheck("Entry cadence", config.get("entry_scan_interval_minutes") == 5, f"entry_scan_interval_minutes={config.get('entry_scan_interval_minutes')!r}"),
128	        SafetyCheck("Open-trade poll cadence", config.get("poll_interval_seconds") == 15, f"poll_interval_seconds={config.get('poll_interval_seconds')!r}"),
129	        SafetyCheck("30-minute LLM heartbeat", schedule_expr(heartbeat) == "0,30 4-10 * * 1-5", f"schedule={schedule_expr(heartbeat)!r}"),
130	        SafetyCheck("Script-only drift guard", bool(guard and guard.get("no_agent") is True), f"no_agent={None if guard is None else guard.get('no_agent')!r}"),
131	        SafetyCheck("Spread filter enabled", bool(risk_filter.get("enabled") is True and risk_filter.get("enforce_spread_filter") is True), f"risk_filter.enabled={risk_filter.get('enabled')!r}, enforce_spread_filter={risk_filter.get('enforce_spread_filter')!r}"),
132	    ]
133	    return checks
134	
135	
136	def inr(value: Any) -> str:
137	    if value is None:
138	        return "n/a"
139	    try:
140	        amount = Decimal(str(value))
141	    except Exception:
142	        return str(value)
143	    sign = "-" if amount < 0 else ""
144	    amount = abs(amount)
145	    return f"{sign}₹{amount:,.2f}"
146	
147	
148	def pct_from_open(ltp: Any, open_value: Any) -> Decimal | None:
149	    try:
150	        ltp_dec = Decimal(str(ltp))
151	        open_dec = Decimal(str(open_value))
152	    except Exception:
153	        return None
154	    if open_dec <= 0:
155	        return None
156	    return ((ltp_dec - open_dec) / open_dec * Decimal("100")).quantize(Decimal("0.01"))
157	
158	
159	def age_status(age_seconds: Any, stale_limit: int) -> tuple[str, str]:
160	    if age_seconds is None:
161	        return "UNKNOWN", "No quote timestamp"
162	    try:
163	        age = float(age_seconds)
164	    except Exception:
165	        return "UNKNOWN", str(age_seconds)
166	    if age <= stale_limit:
167	        return "OK", f"{age:.0f}s old"
168	    if age <= stale_limit * 2:
169	        return "WARN", f"{age:.0f}s old"
170	    return "STALE", f"{age:.0f}s old"
171	
172	
173	def get_db_snapshot() -> dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:
174	    return {
175	        "campaign": fetch_rows(
176	            """
177	            select campaign_id, name, starting_capital, active, max_daily_loss,
178	                   max_open_positions, max_trades_per_day, stop_loss_pct, target_pct,
179	                   no_new_trades_after, force_exit_time, poll_interval_seconds, updated_at
180	            from research.option_paper_campaigns
181	            order by updated_at desc
182	            limit 1
183	            """
184	        ),
185	        "banknifty_quote": fetch_rows(
186	            """
187	            select symbol, ltp, open, high, low, close, volume, quote_time, updated_at,
188	                   extract(epoch from (now() - updated_at)) as age_seconds
189	            from market.quotes
190	            where symbol='NSE:NIFTYBANK-INDEX'
191	            """
192	        ),
193	        "open_trades": fetch_rows(
194	            """
195	            select t.option_trade_id, t.symbol, t.option_type, t.expiry, t.strike,
196	                   t.entry_premium, q.ltp as current_premium, t.stop_premium, t.target_premium,
197	                   t.highest_premium, t.quantity, t.premium_value, t.entry_time,
198	                   t.strategy_version,
199	                   case when q.ltp is not null then (q.ltp - t.entry_premium) * t.quantity else null end as unrealized_pnl,
200	                   extract(epoch from (now() - q.updated_at)) as quote_age_seconds
201	            from research.option_paper_trades t
202	            left join market.quotes q on q.symbol = t.symbol
203	            where t.status='open'
204	            order by t.entry_time desc
205	            """
206	        ),
207	        "risk_today": fetch_rows(
208	            """
209	            select count(*) filter (where created_at at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata' >= (now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')::date) as trades_today,
210	                   coalesce(sum(case when status='closed' and exit_time at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata' >= (now() at time zone 'Asia/Kolkata')::date then realized_pnl else 0 end), 0) as realized_today,
211	                   count(*) filter (where status='open') as open_count,
212	                   count(*) as total_trades
213	            from research.option_paper_trades
214	            """
215	        ),
216	        "latest_events": fetch_rows(
217	            """
218	            select e.event_time, e.event_type, e.premium, e.quantity, e.message,
219	                   t.symbol, t.option_type
220	            from research.option_paper_trade_events e
221	            left join research.option_paper_trades t on t.option_trade_id = e.option_trade_id
222	            order by e.event_time desc
223	            limit 50
224	            """
225	        ),
226	        "daily_snapshots": fetch_rows(
227	            """
228	            select snapshot_date, starting_capital, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, equity,
229	                   open_positions, closed_positions
230	            from research.option_paper_daily_snapshots
231	            order by snapshot_date desc
232	            limit 30
233	            """
234	        ),
235	        "constituent_quotes": fetch_rows(
236	            """
237	            with configured as (
238	              select jsonb_array_elements(%s::jsonb) as item
239	            )
240	            select item->>'symbol' as symbol,
241	                   item->>'fyers_symbol' as fyers_symbol,
242	                   q.ltp, q.open, q.updated_at,
243	                   extract(epoch from (now() - q.updated_at)) as age_seconds,
244	                   case when q.open is not null and q.open > 0 then round(((q.ltp - q.open) / q.open * 100)::numeric, 2) else null end as pct_from_open
245	            from configured
246	            left join market.quotes q on q.symbol = item->>'fyers_symbol'
247	            order by pct_from_open desc nulls last
248	            """,
249	            [json.dumps(load_json_file(CONFIG_PATH).get("constituents") or [])],
250	        ),
251	    }
252	
253	
254	def render_status_badge(st: Any, check: SafetyCheck) -> None:
255	    if check.ok:
256	        st.success(f"{check.name}: OK — {check.detail}")
257	    else:
258	        st.error(f"{check.name}: FAIL — {check.detail}")
259	
260	
261	def main() -> None:  # pragma: no cover - exercised by Streamlit smoke import plus manual run
262	    import streamlit as st
263	    import streamlit.components.v1 as components
264	
265	    st.set_page_config(page_title="BankNifty Options Paper Monitor", layout="wide")
266	    st.title("BankNifty Options Paper Monitor")
267	    st.caption("Read-only dashboard. No LLM calls. No FYERS order calls. PostgreSQL SELECT-only access.")
268	
269	    with st.sidebar:
270	        st.header("Refresh")
271	        refresh_seconds = st.number_input("Auto-refresh seconds", min_value=0, max_value=300, value=15, step=5)
272	        if refresh_seconds:
273	            components.html(f"<script>setTimeout(() => window.parent.location.reload(), {int(refresh_seconds) * 1000});</script>", height=0)
274	        st.write(f"IST now: {datetime.now(IST).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}")
275	        st.write(f"Project: `{PROJECT_ROOT}`")
276	        st.write(f"DB: `127.0.0.1:55432/finance_tracker`")
277	
278	    try:
279	        config = load_json_file(CONFIG_PATH)
280	        jobs_doc = load_json_file(JOBS_PATH)
281	        snapshot = get_db_snapshot()
282	    except Exception as exc:
283	        st.exception(exc)
284	        return
285	
286	    safety_checks = evaluate_system_safety(config, jobs_doc)
287	    safe = all(check.ok for check in safety_checks)
288	    if safe:
289	        st.success("System safety checks passed: deterministic paper monitor is script-only and live orders are disabled.")
290	    else:
291	        st.error("System safety checks failed. Do not trust paper-monitor output until fixed.")
292	
293	    tab_health, tab_live, tab_positions, tab_events, tab_equity, tab_cron = st.tabs([
294	        "System health", "Live market", "Open position", "Events", "Equity", "Cron/config"
295	    ])
296	
297	    with tab_health:
298	        cols = st.columns(3)
299	        for idx, check in enumerate(safety_checks):
300	            with cols[idx % 3]:
301	                render_status_badge(st, check)
302	
303	        campaign = snapshot["campaign"][0] if snapshot["campaign"] else {}
304	        risk = snapshot["risk_today"][0] if snapshot["risk_today"] else {}
305	        m1, m2, m3, m4 = st.columns(4)
306	        m1.metric("Starting capital", inr(campaign.get("starting_capital")))
307	        m2.metric("Realized today", inr(risk.get("realized_today")))
308	        m3.metric("Trades today", f"{risk.get('trades_today', 0)} / {config.get('max_trades_per_day')}")
309	        m4.metric("Open positions", f"{risk.get('open_count', 0)} / {config.get('max_open_positions')}")
310	
311	    with tab_live:
312	        quote = snapshot["banknifty_quote"][0] if snapshot["banknifty_quote"] else {}
313	        age_label, age_detail = age_status(quote.get("age_seconds"), int(config.get("quote_stale_seconds", 90)))
314	        pct = pct_from_open(quote.get("ltp"), quote.get("open"))
315	        q1, q2, q3, q4 = st.columns(4)
316	        q1.metric("BankNifty LTP", inr(quote.get("ltp")))
317	        q2.metric("% from open", "n/a" if pct is None else f"{pct}%")
318	        q3.metric("Quote freshness", age_label, age_detail)
319	        q4.metric("Volume", str(quote.get("volume") or "n/a"))
320	
321	        constituents = snapshot["constituent_quotes"]
322	        fresh = [row for row in constituents if row.get("age_seconds") is not None and float(row["age_seconds"]) <= float(config.get("quote_stale_seconds", 90))]
323	        coverage_pct = (len(fresh) / len(constituents) * 100) if constituents else 0
324	        st.metric("Fresh constituent coverage", f"{coverage_pct:.1f}%", f"{len(fresh)} / {len(constituents)}")
325	        st.subheader("Constituent movers")
326	        st.dataframe(constituents, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)
327	
328	    with tab_positions:
329	        open_trades = snapshot["open_trades"]
330	        if not open_trades:
331	            st.info("No open BankNifty option paper trades.")
332	        else:
333	            st.dataframe(open_trades, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)
334	
335	    with tab_events:
336	        st.dataframe(snapshot["latest_events"], use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)
337	
338	    with tab_equity:
339	        daily = list(reversed(snapshot["daily_snapshots"]))
340	        if daily:
341	            st.line_chart({str(row["snapshot_date"]): float(row["equity"] or 0) for row in daily})
342	        st.dataframe(snapshot["daily_snapshots"], use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)
343	
344	    with tab_cron:
345	        jobs = [find_job(jobs_doc, name) for name in [MONITOR_JOB_NAME, HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME, DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME]]
346	        compact_jobs = [
347	            {
348	                "id": job.get("id"),
349	                "name": job.get("name"),
350	                "enabled": job.get("enabled"),
351	                "state": job.get("state"),
352	                "schedule": schedule_expr(job),
353	                "script": job.get("script"),
354	                "no_agent": job.get("no_agent"),
355	                "model": job.get("model"),
356	                "provider": job.get("provider"),
357	                "last_run_at": job.get("last_run_at"),
358	                "last_status": job.get("last_status"),
359	                "next_run_at": job.get("next_run_at"),
360	            }
361	            for job in jobs if job
362	        ]
363	        st.dataframe(compact_jobs, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)
364	        st.subheader("Runtime config")
365	        st.json({
366	            "campaign_name": config.get("campaign_name"),
367	            "strategy_version": config.get("strategy_version"),
368	            "paper_only": config.get("paper_only"),
369	            "live_orders_enabled": config.get("live_orders_enabled"),
370	            "entry_scan_interval_minutes": config.get("entry_scan_interval_minutes"),
371	            "poll_interval_seconds": config.get("poll_interval_seconds"),
372	            "max_trades_per_day": config.get("max_trades_per_day"),
373	            "max_daily_loss": config.get("max_daily_loss"),
374	            "max_trade_loss": config.get("max_trade_loss"),
375	            "risk_filter": config.get("risk_filter"),
376	        })
377	
378	
379	if __name__ == "__main__":
380	    main()
381

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	cd /opt/data/finance-db
4	
5	# Read-only dashboard. Bind to loopback by default; use SSH tunnel/VPN/reverse proxy with auth.
6	# Example SSH tunnel from your laptop:

8	# Then open http://127.0.0.1:8501 locally.

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import importlib.util
4	from pathlib import Path
5	
6	import sys
7	
8	import pytest
9	
10	MODULE_PATH = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "dashboard" / "banknifty_options_dashboard.py"
11	spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("banknifty_options_dashboard", MODULE_PATH)
12	dashboard = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
13	assert spec and spec.loader
14	sys.modules["banknifty_options_dashboard"] = dashboard
15	spec.loader.exec_module(dashboard)
16	
17	
18	def job(name, *, no_agent=True, schedule="* * * * 1-5", script="x.sh", model=None, provider=None, base_url=None):
19	    return {
20	        "name": name,
21	        "enabled": True,
22	        "no_agent": no_agent,
23	        "script": script,
24	        "model": model,
25	        "provider": provider,
26	        "base_url": base_url,
27	        "schedule": {"expr": schedule},
28	    }
29	
30	
31	def safe_config():
32	    return {
33	        "paper_only": True,
34	        "live_orders_enabled": False,
35	        "entry_scan_interval_minutes": 5,
36	        "poll_interval_seconds": 15,
37	        "risk_filter": {"enabled": True, "enforce_spread_filter": True},
38	    }
39	
40	
41	def safe_jobs():
42	    return {
43	        "jobs": [
44	            job(dashboard.MONITOR_JOB_NAME, no_agent=True, schedule="* * * * 1-5"),
45	            job(dashboard.HEARTBEAT_JOB_NAME, no_agent=None, schedule="0,30 4-10 * * 1-5"),
46	            job(dashboard.DRIFT_GUARD_JOB_NAME, no_agent=True, schedule="*/5 4-10 * * 1-5"),
47	        ]
48	    }
49	
50	
51	def test_evaluate_system_safety_all_ok_for_current_design():
52	    checks = dashboard.evaluate_system_safety(safe_config(), safe_jobs())

65	    ],
66	)
67	def test_evaluate_system_safety_detects_drift(mutator, failing_name):

72	    failed = {check.name for check in checks if not check.ok}

241	    if not isinstance(raw, list) or not raw:
242	        return default_banknifty_constituents()
243	    parsed: list[BankNiftyConstituent] = []
244	    for item in raw:

247	        symbol = str(item.get("symbol") or "").strip().upper()
248	        fyers_symbol = str(item.get("fyers_symbol") or f"NSE:{symbol}-EQ").strip()
249	        weight_raw = item.get("weight")
250	        weight = None if weight_raw in (None, "", 0, "0") else Decimal(str(weight_raw))
251	        if symbol and fyers_symbol:

253	    return tuple(parsed) if parsed else default_banknifty_constituents()

256	def bool_from_config(value: Any, *, default: bool = False) -> bool:
257	    if value is None:
258	        return default
259	    if isinstance(value, bool):
260	        return value
261	    if isinstance(value, str):
262	        lowered = value.strip().lower()
263	        if lowered in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on", "enabled"}:
264	            return True
265	        if lowered in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off", "disabled"}:
266	            return False
267	    return bool(value)
268	
269	
270	def strict_bool_from_config(value: Any, *, key: str) -> bool:
271	    """Parse top-level safety booleans without permissive truthiness."""
272	    if isinstance(value, bool):
273	        return value
274	    if isinstance(value, str):
275	        lowered = value.strip().lower()
276	        if lowered in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on", "enabled"}:
277	            return True
278	        if lowered in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off", "disabled"}:
279	            return False
280	    raise SystemExit(f"Refusing to run: {key} must be an explicit boolean true/false.")
281

288	    except Exception:
289	        return default

302	    """Parse the deterministic option risk filter block with safe paper defaults."""
303	    defaults = RiskFilterConfig()
304	    if not isinstance(raw, dict):
305	        return defaults
306	    return RiskFilterConfig(
307	        enabled=bool_from_config(raw.get("enabled"), default=defaults.enabled),
308	        enforce_spread_filter=bool_from_config(raw.get("enforce_spread_filter"), default=defaults.enforce_spread_filter),
309	        max_spread_pct=decimal_from_config(raw.get("max_spread_pct"), defaults.max_spread_pct),
310	        max_spread_rupees=decimal_from_config(raw.get("max_spread_rupees"), defaults.max_spread_rupees),
311	        min_volume=int_from_config(raw.get("min_volume"), defaults.min_volume),
312	        require_greeks=bool_from_config(raw.get("require_greeks"), default=defaults.require_greeks),
313	        min_abs_delta=decimal_from_config(raw.get("min_abs_delta"), defaults.min_abs_delta),
314	        max_abs_theta=decimal_from_config(raw.get("max_abs_theta"), defaults.max_abs_theta),
315	        max_iv=decimal_from_config(raw.get("max_iv"), defaults.max_iv),
316	        require_iv=bool_from_config(raw.get("require_iv"), default=defaults.require_iv),
317	    )
